prompt: Operator: GELU activation, tanh/Padé approximation form (out = 0.5 * x * (1 + tanh(sqrt(2/pi) * (x + 0.044715 * x^3)))). Input shapes: [1, 128], [4, 2048], [32, 4096]. Output shape: same_as_input. Dtype: float32. Layout: contiguous. Axis: null. Tiling: TILE_SIZE divides every shape evenly; partition tile_per_core via asc2.range; use asc2.load/store and asc2.tensor; compute sqrt(2/pi) and the 0.044715 constant as Python module-level constants outside the @asc2.jit body; use asc2.tanh (the tanh/Padé form of GELU is the correctness specification at this cell — asc2.erf is excluded from this cell's correctness spec, see the cell's regime_note). Tail: aligned_only. Accumulator: null. Tolerance: atol=1e-2, rtol=1e-2 against 0.5 * x * (1 + np.tanh(np.sqrt(2.0 / np.pi) * (x + 0.044715 * x**3))). Platform: Ascend950PR_9599. Build/run: python3.10 kernel.py -r Model -v Ascend950PR_9599. Evidence: kernel.py (skills-on adds design.md + verification.md).
notes: Phase 3 Stage 3.4 — stability trial #3; gelu/float32 P3; cloud-default; dashscope/glm-5
